result.summary: Myanmar's food security is under threat due to fuel and fertilizer shortages, exacerbating a fragile economy already battered by civil war and runaway inflation.
result.reasoning: The articles highlight the country's vulnerability to global energy shocks and its limited capacity to replenish essential stocks, indicating a medium risk level.

signals.text: Southeast Asia faces spiking food prices, Myanmar will be hit worst.

best.description: Myanmar's economy stabilizes with international aid and domestic reforms.

likely.description: Myanmar experiences a prolonged food crisis, leading to increased poverty and instability.

worst.description: Myanmar's situation deteriorates further, leading to widespread famine and humanitarian crises.

sources.name: gnews
sources.title: Myanmar's food security in crisis as fuel, fertiliser shortages threaten fragile economy
